workflows.name: Create trip and configure visibility
workflows.start_state: Organizer has a trip idea but no structured trip hub.
workflows.end_state: Trip exists with clear public/private boundaries.

workflows.name: Invite and approve members
workflows.start_state: Trip exists but members do not have access.
workflows.end_state: Approved members can access private trip details.

workflows.name: Publish public trip page and collect contributions
workflows.start_state: Trip exists but public supporters cannot yet contribute.
system_actions: update contribution ledger and organizer payout context
workflows.end_state: Trip has active public contribution flow with ledger visibility.

workflows.name: Log trip-wide expenses
workflows.start_state: Trip spending occurs but is not yet recorded.
system_actions: make it visible to authorized users
workflows.end_state: Trip expense appears in the main trip ledger.

workflows.name: Upload receipt, extract data, translate, and convert display currency
workflows.start_state: User has a receipt that needs to become a usable expense record.
system_actions: translate text to trip default or override language
preserve original receipt values as source of truth
workflows.end_state: Receipt becomes a corrected, localized expense artifact with original values preserved.

workflows.name: Publish bulletin updates and public highlights
workflows.start_state: Trip activity exists but public/supporter-facing updates are outdated.
user_actions: choose whether content is public or member-only
workflows.end_state: Supporters and members receive the appropriate trip update.

workflows.name: Upload and view member-only trip album
workflows.start_state: Trip participants have photos but no shared album.
user_actions: organizer optionally promotes selected photos as public highlights
system_actions: publish approved highlights publicly when selected
workflows.end_state: Members have a private album with optional organizer-approved public highlights.

workflows.name: Create private sub-event with selected members
workflows.start_state: A subset of trip members needs a private side activity space.
user_actions: select participants from approved trip members
workflows.end_state: Private event exists and is visible only to selected participants.

workflows.name: Track private sub-event expenses and payment status
workflows.start_state: A private event exists but spending and payment obligations are not tracked.
system_actions: keep event balances separate from trip ledger
workflows.end_state: Private event participants can see event-specific balances and payment status.

workflows.name: Review trip-level and event-level balances separately
workflows.start_state: Trip and event financial activity exist across multiple scopes.
user_actions: view trip-wide contribution and expense status
system_actions: avoid auto-merging event balances into trip totals in MVP
workflows.end_state: Users understand trip-wide and event-level balances without scope confusion.
